en-us.html:
News

  • Lore

  • September 4th, 2024

Reading time

3 minutes

For nearly three-quarters of a century, the Nifir had regularly plagued the Asgarthan population. Brought back from the salt mines of the island of Suspira, this unknown disease spread like an ink stain across the rest of the Peninsula. Arkaster, due to its high population density, was hit particularly hard, leading to frequent quarantines in an effort to contain its spread. Unfortunately, despite all precautions, the plague came and went in relentless epidemic waves.

Themba Hekekia was a botanist specializing in the study of rare plants. He followed in the footsteps of his father, who was also a naturalist. When his father died from the Nifir, Hekekia vowed to find a cure for this affliction. He stumbled upon it almost by accident when he began studying the mushs, a family of mushrooms that have the unique characteristic of being sentient. Over time, these conscious mushrooms accepted Hekekia into their forest or underground colonies, allowing him to study their ecosystems and various “customs.”

He was astonished to discover that they had the ability to filter Mana from the environment and living beings, transforming unstable Mana into appeased Mana by passing it through their bodies. This discovery was crucial in curing the Nifir. Numerous mush spores were sent to all corners of the Peninsula, and over time, they grew into adult mushs. These, using their mycelium, could extract unstable Mana and offer purified Mana in return. Within a few years, thanks to this fortuitous discovery, the Nifir was eradicated from Asgartha.

paragraphs: For nearly three-quarters of a century, the Nifir had regularly plagued the Asgarthan population. Brought back from the salt mines of the island of Suspira, this unknown disease spread like an ink stain across the rest of the Peninsula. Arkaster, due to its high population density, was hit particularly hard, leading to frequent quarantines in an effort to contain its spread. Unfortunately, despite all precautions, the plague came and went in relentless epidemic waves.

Themba Hekekia was a botanist specializing in the study of rare plants. He followed in the footsteps of his father, who was also a naturalist. When his father died from the Nifir, Hekekia vowed to find a cure for this affliction. He stumbled upon it almost by accident when he began studying the mushs, a family of mushrooms that have the unique characteristic of being sentient. Over time, these conscious mushrooms accepted Hekekia into their forest or underground colonies, allowing him to study their ecosystems and various “customs.”

He was astonished to discover that they had the ability to filter Mana from the environment and living beings, transforming unstable Mana into appeased Mana by passing it through their bodies. This discovery was crucial in curing the Nifir. Numerous mush spores were sent to all corners of the Peninsula, and over time, they grew into adult mushs. These, using their mycelium, could extract unstable Mana and offer purified Mana in return. Within a few years, thanks to this fortuitous discovery, the Nifir was eradicated from Asgartha.

fr-fr.html:
Articles

  • Lore

  • 4 septembre 2024

Temps de lecture

3 minutes

Cela faisait déjà près de trois-quarts de siècle que le Nifir frappait régulièrement la population Asgarthi. Rapportée des mines de sel de l’île de Suspira, cette maladie inconnue s’était répandue comme une tache d’encre dans le reste de la péninsule. Arkaster, du fait de sa forte concentration démographique, fut durement touchée, au point d’établir de fréquentes quarantaines pour tenter d’endiguer sa propagation. Malheureusement, malgré toutes les précautions prises, ce fléau allait et venait au gré de vagues épidémiques irrémédiables.

Themba Hekekia était un botaniste spécialisé dans l’étude de plantes rares. Il avait suivi les traces de son père, lui aussi naturaliste. Lorsque ce dernier décéda du Nifir, il se jura de trouver un remède à cette affliction. Il tomba dessus presque par hasard, lorsqu’il se mit à étudier les mushs, une famille de champignons qui a la particularité d’être sentiente. Avec le temps, ces derniers acceptèrent Hekekia dans leurs colonies forestières ou souterraines, et lui permirent d'étudier leurs écosystèmes et leurs différentes “coutumes”.

Il fut abasourdi de découvrir qu’ils avaient la possibilité de filtrer le Mana de l’environnement et des êtres vivants ; de transformer du Mana instable en Mana apaisé en le faisant transiter au sein de leur organisme. Cette découverte fut essentielle dans la guérison du Nifir. De nombreux spores mushs furent envoyés aux quatre coins de la péninsule, et avec le temps, ils se muèrent en mushs adultes. Ces derniers, utilisant leur mycélium, pouvaient extraire le Mana instable et offrir du Mana purifié en retour. En quelques années, grâce à cette découverte fortuite, le Nifir fut éradiqué d’Asgartha.
